login.tagline: The household app to share routines, plans and moments together.
login.title: Sign in
login.missingFirebase: Missing Firebase configuration. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_* variables in .env.local.
login.profileBootstrapInfo: Signed in, but Firestore profile setup will finish on your next action.
login.verifyEmailBeforeLogin: Verify your email address before signing in.
login.missingCredentials: Enter your email or username and your password.
login.firebaseBeforeLogin: Add Firebase variables in .env.local before signing in.
login.forgotNeedEmail: Enter your email first to receive the reset link.
login.firebaseBeforeReset: Add Firebase variables in .env.local before using Firebase Auth.
login.resetFailed: Unable to send password reset email.
login.firebaseBeforeGoogle: Add Firebase variables in .env.local before using Google.

signup.tagline: The household app to share routines, plans and moments together.
signup.title: Create account
signup.missingFirebase: Missing Firebase configuration. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_* variables in .env.local.
signup.requiredFields: Fill in all fields to create your account.
signup.firebaseBeforeCreate: Add Firebase variables in .env.local before creating an account.
signup.accountCreatedInfo: Account created. Verify your email, then sign in. Redirecting in 5 seconds...

search.title: Explore
search.placeholder: This area will handle search inside HarmoHome.

home.title: Your hub
home.description: Find every household mini-app in one place.

noHousehold.title: No household connected
noHousehold.description: Create or join a household to share games and reminders.

household.title: Household management
household.withHouseholdDescription: Manage members, invites and household settings.
household.withoutHouseholdDescription: Create or join a household to sync your shared experience.
household.inviteDetectedDescription: An invite link was detected. You can join this household in one tap.
household.inviteCodeDescription: Share this code or generate an invite link for a member.
household.ownerHint: As owner, you can invite or remove members.
household.memberHint: Only the owner can manage household members.
household.confirmDelete: Delete this household for everyone? This action is permanent.

errors.missingIdentifier: Enter a household ID or invite code.
errors.inviteLink: Invite link is invalid or expired.

settings.title: Preferences
settings.intro: Device push is primary, Telegram is fallback. Each member has their own schedule.

telegram.title: Telegram
telegram.description: Tap Connect Telegram, then press Start in the bot. Your chat ID will be filled automatically.

pilluleReminder.title: Pill reminder (local time)
pilluleReminder.description: First send at the hour below, then repeats with the selected cadence.

gameReminder.title: Game reminder
gameReminder.description: Game notification time is randomly picked each day (local time).

info.telegramOpened: Telegram opened. Send Start to finish linking.
info.pushEnabledDevice: Push notifications enabled on this device.
info.pushDisabledDevice: Push notifications disabled on this device.

errors.invalidSession: Invalid session. Please sign in again.
errors.pushTokenMissing: Push token missing on this device.
errors.pushEnableDevice: Unable to enable push on this device.
errors.pushDisableDevice: Unable to disable push on this device.
